text: Applied. Copied the baked files into src/sites/editorialcontrol/public/images/blog/ai-doesnt-remember/ (feature-filtered, feature-og, feature-raw). Wired image + socialImage into the post frontmatter and bumped dateModified to today. Run npm run dev and visit /blog/ai-doesnt-remember on the editorialcontrol build to preview. Commit when you're satisfied.
